statement.p: In one college math course, the final grade (out of 100 points) is calculated by adding one-half of the homework average, one-sixth of the midterm score, and one-third of the final exam score.
Annika has 90 for her homework average and 88 for her midterm score. Her goal is to finish the course with a final grade of 70. What must she score on the final exam?
